ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALVARADO, OLIVIA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ALVARADO, OLIVIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLAYES, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, OLIVIA DOES 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
JUDGE DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK 09:00AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL. WRITTEN STIPULATION IS SUBMITTED. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE WRITTEN STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVARADO, OLIVIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 420 LAKE STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO $1,800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-12-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. IF DEFT VACATES ON TIMELY BASIS, THEN MONEY DAMAGES AND COSTS ARE WAIVED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
